name: Maple Apple Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup margarine - becel light, or butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream eggs and margarine in a bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Add maple syrup and apples. Mix well.
4. Sift dry ingredients into the mixture. Stir until moistened.
5. Pour batter into greased muffin tins.
6. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
